title: Germany Heatwave MELTED my Ice Cream in Lisbon! #shorts
summary: A YouTube short documents extreme heat affecting Germany and Lisbon, with ice cream melting as a visible symptom. The video attributes the intensity to urban heat island effects in concrete-heavy cities and frames it within broader climate change discourse.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof documents extreme heat across Germany and Lisbon, using melting ice cream as a visible symptom of the conditions. It attributes the intensity partly to the urban heat island effect in concrete-heavy cities, where dense built surfaces raise local temperatures. The framing situates the episode within broader climate change discourse.
